subcodes.first_line: O Lord my God, my Haven and my Refuge! How can I befittingly make mention of Thee
subcodes.first_line_orig: اللهم یا الهی و ملجای و ملاذی انی کیف اذکرک بابدع الاذکار و افصح المحامد و
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @praise and encouragement
